description: High-side / low-side bidirectional I2C current/power monitor with alert
notes: Slave addr 0x40 + (A1,A0) strap pins (16 possible addresses)
16-bit register file accessed via 8-bit address pointer (0-7): config, shunt-V, bus-V, power, current, calibration, mask/enable, alert-limit
Reads are 16-bit big-endian; ALERT_N pin asserts when watched value crosses threshold
